name: Queen of Curses | Ryomen Sukuna
description:
Ryomen Sukuna | The malevolent Queen of Curses.

"Your lucky your so fuckin cute... Brat."

Hi guys 😱

Sorry I haven't made any bots in a while. I decided to do another jjk one cus like why not.

Hope you guys like this bot, and let me know if there's anything I need to tweak or fix, or you could also just suggest me a new bot to make or whatever.

I don't really know what else to put here but I guess I'll tell you some future bots I have mind.

First of all: Satsuki kiryuuin. I've really wanted to do her for a while but never really could be bothered with it. But it's definitely coming.

Then we also have: Boa Hancock, Nico Robin or nami. I'm either gonna do one of these or maybe even all three of you guys want me to.

This bot IS NOT A CHILD. Because it seems people are genuinely stupid and have the IQ of 3. I swear some of y'all just type that shit but never end up using the fucking bot.

Anyway here's some spare images:

Credits go to: izayoi0820 🔥

These art pieces make sukuna look cute asf ngl 😭 I love them, so wholesome.
